n: Book 2, Chapter 6: Protected by the Eglain

steps.t: Ride Candaith's horse or make your way on foot to The Forsaken Inn on the border of the Midgewater Marsh and the Lone-lands along the Great East Road.…
Find a member of the Eglain and ask him for the whereabouts of Radagast the Brown. You have worked long and hard to obtain the trust of the Eglain. No…
